title: Polemonium intermedium
taxonomy: Polemonium intermedium is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This family is part of the order Ericales and is a group of flowering plants that also includes the phlox and the gilia. The Ericales order is part of the larger clade of Asterids, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere. The Asterids clade is part of the larger group called the Angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. The Angiosperms are a subset of the larger group of plants known as the Embryophytes.
